fields.summary: Represents the component swizzle configuration for a Vulkan YCbCr sampler conversion.
fields.remarks:
<format type="text/markdown"><![CDATA[
## Remarks

Represents the component swizzle mapping for a Vulkan YCbCr conversion. Each property specifies which source channel maps to the R, G, B, or A output component, using Vulkan component swizzle identity values.

## Examples

```csharp
var components = new GRVkYcbcrComponents
{
    R = 0, // VK_COMPONENT_SWIZZLE_IDENTITY
    G = 0,
    B = 0,
    A = 0
};
```
]]></format>

fields.summary: Gets or sets the swizzle value for the alpha component.
fields.value: A <see cref="T:System.UInt32" /> representing the Vulkan component swizzle for the alpha channel.

fields.summary: Gets or sets the swizzle value for the blue component.
fields.value: A <see cref="T:System.UInt32" /> representing the Vulkan component swizzle for the blue channel.
